title: Mekanism: Plums
description: This emotional mod adds the long-needed support for Mekanism plums. Fixed MANY lives!
body:
# About
Mekanism is really, really, a great mod. But for me, something was always missing. A tiny piece, yet a cornerstone. A speck of dust, yet probably so life-changing. Then it struck. It paralized me to the core... Mekanism never had plum support. It has never had plums. Oh my god. Gut wrenching.
# Goals
This mod aims to fix the lives of dozens with its simplistic morale boosting goal - fixing something that cracked people so deeply that they never knew it was broken. Everyone needs plums, so we delivered. You can get your plum by metallurgically infusing an apple (because everyone knows apples have iron in them) with refined obsidian. You'll get a juicy, tasty, satisfying plum. That is what this is all about. It's about efficiently delivering things everyone needed. We are a lifeline.
# Afterword
We hope this world will be more demanding of those with power to give. And we hope that those powerless, who we once were, will strive to create and reclaim what's ours.
